testcase.name: test_waitlist_create_list_delete
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter7.py:287: in test_waitlist_create_list_delete assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"iter7_waitlist@test.local","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
